import urllib.request
import urllib.parse


BASE_URL = "http://localhost:53889"


def test_01_empty_state_shows_friendly_message():
    """Criteria 3: If no todos exist, the page shows a friendly message like 'No tasks yet.'"""
    req = urllib.request.Request(BASE_URL)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
        html = resp.read().decode("utf-8")

    assert "empty-state" in html, "Empty state element not found when no todos exist."
    assert "No tasks yet" in html, "Friendly 'No tasks yet' message missing from empty state."


def test_02_add_todo_and_view_in_list():
    """Criteria 1, 2, 4: List displays all added todos with text content; new todos appear immediately."""

    # Add a todo via POST (form submission)
    task_text = "Buy groceries"
    data = urllib.parse.urlencode({"task": task_text}).encode("utf-8")
    req_post = urllib.request.Request(BASE_URL, data=data, method="POST")
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req_post) as resp:
        post_html = resp.read().decode("utf-8")

    # GET the page to verify the todo appears immediately (Criteria 4)
    req_get = urllib.request.Request(BASE_URL)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req_get) as resp:
        get_html = resp.read().decode("utf-8")

    # Criteria 1: Page displays a clear list of all added todos
    assert "todo-list" in get_html, "Todo list element not found after adding a todo."
    assert "<li class=\"todo-item\">" in get_html, "Todo item list element not found."

    # Criteria 2: Each todo shows its text content clearly
    assert task_text in get_html, f"Todo text '{task_text}' not visible in the rendered page."
